## GitHub Contribution Snake
An automated GitHub Actions workflow that generates an animated SVG snake based on my GitHub contribution graph.

## Preview

<p align="center"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/IMRAN-8/github-contribution-snake/output/snake.svg" /></p>

## Features

- Generates an animated GitHub contribution snake
- Updates automatically every day
- Can be embedded in any GitHub profile README
- Fully automated using GitHub Actions
